card.name: CB05 Unyielding Wight
card.text: Menace Ceaseless {1}{B} (You may cast this creature from your graveyard for its ceaseless cost if you have no cards in hand. It enters with a finality counter.)

card.name: CR06
card.text: Menace This creature enters with a +1/+1 counter on it. Defiant (If this would be destroyed while it has +1+1 counters on it, remove all +1/+1 counters from it and it gains indestructible until end of turn.)

card.name: CW02
card.text: Whenever this creature attacks alone, it gains first strike until end of turn.

card.name: CW01
card.text: Vigilance This creature gets +1/+1 as long as you control a creature with a +1/+1 counter on it.

card.name: CW07
card.text: Lifelink, vigilance

card.name: CW03 Champion of the Pride
card.text: At the beginning of each end step, if you gained life this turn, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: CW06 Unwavering Swordmaster
card.text: This creature enters with a +1/+1 counter on it. Defiant (If this would be destroyed while it has +1+1 counters on it, remove all +1/+1 counters from it and it gains indestructible until end of turn.)

card.name: CU01 Crypt Delver
card.text: Vigilance Whenever a creature you control attacks alone, surveil 1.

card.name: CW05 Saddled Griffin
card.text: Flying Whenever this creature attacks, another target attacking creature you control gains flying until end of turn.

card.name: CW09
card.text: Whenever a creature you control attacks alone, put a +1/+1 counter on it. Defiant (If this would be destroyed while it has +1+1 counters on it, remove all +1/+1 counters from it and it gains indestructible until end of turn.)

card.name: CW08
card.text: Flying

card.name: CW10
card.text: When this creature enters, put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control. Defiant (If this would be destroyed while it has +1+1 counters on it, remove all +1/+1 counters from it and it gains indestructible until end of turn.)

card.name: CW11
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, you gain 4 life.

card.name: CW14 Heroic Resilience
card.text: Target creature gets +2/+2 until end of turn. If it has a +1/+1 counter on it, it gains indestructible and hexproof until end of turn.

card.name: CW13 Quiescence
card.text: When this enchantment enters, exile target creature an opponent controls until this enchantment leaves the battlefield.

card.name: CW12 Lose Hope
card.text: Lose hope deals 4 damage to target attacking or blocking creature.

card.name: CW15 Left Forgotten
card.text: This spell costs {2} more to cast if it targets a creature. Exile target artifact, enchantment or creature.

card.name: CU02 Singing Skeleton
card.text: When this creature enters, mill three cards.

card.name: CU05
card.text: When this creature enters, create a Scroll token and draw a card. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color. Spend this mana only to cast an instant or sorcery spell.")

card.name: CU04 Carcass Collecter
card.text: Flying {3}{U}{U}: Voracious 2 (If this creature isn't voracious, sacrifice another creature to put two +1/+1 counters on it and it becomes voracious.)

card.name: CW04
card.text: When this creature enters, you gain 2 life. Ceaseless {W} (You may cast this creature from your graveyard for its ceaseless cost if you have no cards in hand. It enters with a finality counter.)

card.name: CU03
card.text: When this creature enters, create a 1/1 black Skeleton creature token. Then surveil X where X is the number of Skeletons and/or Zombies you control.

card.name: CU06 Vagrant Journeymage
card.text: Ward {2} When this creature enters, create a scroll token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color. Spend this mana only to cast an instant or sorcery spell.")

card.name: CU07 Enyin Drakeraider
card.text: Flying Whenever this creature deals combat damage to an opponent, create a Scroll token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color. Spend this mana only to cast an instant or sorcery spell.")

card.name: CU08
card.text: When this creature enters, return up to one target creature an opponent controls to its owner's hand. {5}{U}{U}: Voracious 3. (If this creature isn't voracious, sacrifice another creature to put three +1/+1 counters on it and it becomes voracious.)

card.name: CU10
card.text: Counter target spell. If a creature spell was countered this way, create a 1/1 black Skeleton creature token.

card.name: CU12
card.text: Surveil 3, then draw three cards.

card.name: CU13 Spiritual Projection
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature loses all abilities and is a Spirit with flying and base power and toughness 1/1.

card.name: CU09 Spellbubble
card.text: Counter target spell or ability that targets a permanent you control.

card.name: CU14 Hold Firm
card.text: Put target creature on the bottom of its owner's library. If you control three or more creatures put it into its owner's library under the top three cards instead.

card.name: CB01 Rotting Sentry
card.text: This creature can't attack unless you control another Zombie, Skeleton or Warlock.

card.name: CB04
card.text: Deathtouch, lifelink

card.name: CB07
card.text: Ceaseless {1}{B} (You may cast this creature from your graveyard for its ceaseless cost if you have no cards in hand. It enters with a finality counter.)

card.name: CB03
card.text: {2}{B}: Voracious 1. (If this creature isn't voracious, sacrifice another creature to put one +1/+1 counters on it and it becomes voracious.) As long as this creature is voracious, it has flying.

card.name: CB02
card.text: Lifelink When this creature enters, you draw a card and you lose 1 life.

card.name: CB06
card.text: Whenever another creature you control dies, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: CB08
card.text: When this creature enters create two 1/1 black Skeleton creature tokens. Whenever a Zombie or Skeleton you control dies, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.

card.name: CB09
card.text: Menace {3}{B}{B}: Voracious 2. (If this creature isn't voracious, sacrifice another creature to put two +1/+1 counters on it and it becomes voracious.)

card.name: CB14 Brutal Downfall
card.text: Destroy target creature.

card.name: CB15 Death Wind
card.text: Target creature gets -X/-X until end of turn.

card.name: CB13
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature or pay {2}. Target opponent reveals their hand. You choose a nonland card from it. That player discards that card.

card.name: CB10 Curse of Years
card.text: Curse of Years deals 2 damage to target creature. You gain 2 life.

card.name: CB12
card.text: Draw two cards. Mill two cards. You lose 2 life.

card.name: CB11 Rotting Finality
card.text: Target creature gets -1/-1 until end of turn. If it would die this turn, instead exile it and create a 1/1 black Skeleton creature token.

card.name: CR05 Dashing Blazeblade
card.text: Haste This creature gets +2/+2 as long as you've cast an instant or sorcery spell this turn.

card.name: CR02
card.text: This creature enters with a +1/+1 counter on it. Defiant (If this would be destroyed while it has +1+1 counters on it, remove all +1/+1 counters from it and it gains indestructible until end of turn.)

card.name: CR09
card.text: Trample Ceaseless {3}{R} (You may cast this creature from your graveyard for its ceaseless cost if you have no cards in hand. It enters with a finality counter.)

card.name: CR15 Searing Effigy
card.text: Searing Effigy deals 6 damage to target creature. If mana from a nonland source was spent to cast this spell, scry 2.

card.name: CR14 Molten Insides
card.text: Molten Insides deals 4 damage to target creature. If a creature dealt damage this way would die this turn, exile it instead.

card.name: CR13 Break Blades
card.text: Choose one: • Destroy target artifact. • Break Blades deals 1 damage to each creature you don't control.

card.name: CR12 Cursed Knowledge
card.text: Discard a card. If you do, draw two cards. If you discarded a nonland card, create a scroll token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color. Spend this mana only to cast an instant or sorcery spell.")

card.name: CR11
card.text: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. It gets +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: CR10
card.text: CR10 deals 2 damage to any target. When a creature token is dealt damage this way dies this turn, draw a card.

card.name: CG01 Dedicated Druid
card.text: When this creature enters, you gain 2 life. When you sacrifice this creature, draw a card.

card.name: CG05
card.text: Deathtouch When this creature enters, draw a card.

card.name: CG03
card.text: {T}: Add {G}.

card.text: Reach {2}{G}, Voracious 2. (If this creature isn't voracious, sacrifice another creature to put two +1/+1 counters on it and it becomes voracious.)

card.name: CG06
card.text: Defiant (If this would be destroyed while it has +1+1 counters on it, remove all +1/+1 counters from it and it gains indestructible until end of turn.) {2}, Sacrifice another creature: Put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: CG02
card.text: Vigilance {4}{G}{G}: Voracious 4. (If this creature isn't voracious, sacrifice another creature to put four +1/+1 counters on it and it becomes voracious.)

card.name: CG09
card.text: Vigilance When this creature enters, exile up to one target creature card from a graveyard. If you do, you gain life equal to that card's toughness.

card.name: CG08
card.text: {3}{G}{G}: Voracious 2. (If this creature isn't voracious, sacrifice another creature to put two +1/+1 counters on it and it becomes voracious.) As long as this creature is voracious, it has trample.

card.name: CG10
card.text: Ward {2} (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {2}.) This creature enters with a +1/+1 counter for each creature you control with a +1/+1 counter on it.

card.name: CG11 Vicious Strength
card.text: Target creature you control gets +2/+2 until end of turn. It fights up to one target creature you don't control.

card.name: CG12 Feast
card.text: Target creature you control deals damage equal to its power to target creature an opponent controls. If the creature an opponent controls would die this turn, exile it instead.

card.name: CG13 Return to Nature
card.text: Choose one — • Destroy target artifact. • Destroy target enchantment. • Exile target card from a graveyard.

card.text: Menace Ceaseless {R} (You may cast this creature from your graveyard for its ceaseless cost if you have no cards in hand. It enters with a finality counter.)

card.name: CR03 Scoria Acolyte
card.text: Whenever this creature attacks, add {R}. Until end of turn, you don't lose this mana as steps and phases end.

card.name: CR08 Roiling Lava
card.text: When this creature enters, return target instant or sorcery card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: UG14 Demon's Harvest
card.text: Search your library for a basic Forest card, put that card onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. When you cast a Demon spell, you may exile this card from your graveyard. If you do, you gain 3 life.

card.text: When this artifact enters, draw a card. {1}, {T}: Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color. {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color. Spend this mana only to cast an Instant or Sorcery spell.

card.name: CU11
card.text: Look at the top three cards of your library. If you spent mana not produced by a land to cast this spell, look at the top six cards of your library instead. Put one of them into your hand and the rest on the bottom of your library in any order.

card.text: Surveil 1 (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.) Draw a card.

card.name: UU07
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each Zombie you control. Flying

card.name: UU08
card.text: Draw three cards. If mana from a nonland source was spent to cast this spell, draw four cards instead.

card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature. Draw four cards.

card.name: UU11
card.text: Put up to three target creatures on top of their owners' libraries.

card.name: UB12
card.text: Target player discards two cards. If less than two cards were discarded this way, that player sacrifices a creature.

card.text: Target creature gets -5/-5 until end of turn.

card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, you may pay 1 life, if you do, draw a card. If you didn't pay life this way, you gain 2 life.

card.name: UR09 Strip to the Bone

card.text: Exile the top four cards of your library. Until the end of your next turn, you may play those cards.

card.text: Exile the top two cards of your library. Until the end of your next turn, you may play those cards. Whenever you cast a creature spell this way it gains haste until end of turn.

card.text: Target creature you control fights target creature an opponent controls. When the creature an opponent controls dies this turn, put a +1/+1 counter on a creature you control.

card.name: UC03
card.text: When this creature enters it deals 3 damage to any target.

card.name: UB06
card.text: Menace, deathtouch, lifelink

card.name: UB14
card.text: Return target creature card from your graveyard to your hand. If that creature card is a Skeleton or Zombie with mana value 5 or less, return it to the battlefield instead.

card.name: CG14
card.text: Search your library for a basic land card, put that card onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. Create a 1/1 black Skeleton creature token.

card.name: UG11
card.text: Exile target player's graveyard. You gain 1 life for each creature card exiled this way. Draw a card.

card.name: UC02
card.text: During your turn, this creature has first strike. Whenever this creature deals combat damage to an opponent, discard a card, then draw a card.

card.name: UC01 Geomancer's Servant
card.text: When this creature dies, draw a card.

card.name: UC04
card.text: {2}, {T}: Draw a card. Activate only if a creature died this turn.

card.name: UC08 Titan's Rest
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {3}, {T}, Sacrifice this land, discard a card: Draw two cards.

card.name: UU14
card.text: Target creature can't be blocked this turn. Draw a card.

card.name: UG01
card.text: Vigilance When this creature dies create a 3/3 green Demon Beast creature token.

card.name: UU10 Astute Recall
card.text: Mill three cards. You may return an instant or sorcery card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: UU02
card.text: Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, create a 1/1 black Skeleton creature token.

card.name: Abandoned Sanctuary
card.text: This land enters tapped unless you control one or fewer other lands. {T}: Add {W} or {U}.

card.name: Coastal Monument
card.text: This land enters tapped unless you control one or fewer other lands. {T}: Add {U} or {B}.

card.name: Collapsed Temple
card.text: This land enters tapped unless you control one or fewer other lands. {T}: Add {W} or {B}.

card.name: Desolate Endscape
card.text: This land enters tapped unless you control one or fewer other lands. {T}: Add {U} or {R}.

card.name: Dragons' Grave
card.text: This land enters tapped unless you control one or fewer other lands. {T}: Add {R} or {G}.

card.name: Druid's Lodge
card.text: This land enters tapped unless you control one or fewer other lands. {T}: Add {B} or {G}.

card.name: Mystical Inscriptions
card.text: This land enters tapped unless you control one or fewer other lands. {T}: Add {G} or {U}.

card.name: Plateau Ruins
card.text: This land enters tapped unless you control one or fewer other lands. {T}: Add {R} or {W}.

card.name: Ruined Mansion
card.text: This land enters tapped unless you control one or fewer other lands. {T}: Add {B} or {R}.

card.name: Shattered Statue
card.text: This land enters tapped unless you control one or fewer other lands. {T}: Add {G} or {W}.
